case_title: PRIME IMAGE MEDIA GROUP ALCAIDE M. BRIOSOS M& MOON VS SMITH, EUSTINOVE DBA REM ENTERTAINMENT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PRIME IMAGE MEDIA GROUP ALCAIDE M. BRIOSOS M& MOON AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, EUSTINOVE DBA REM ENTERTAINMENT PEYTON, MONICA DBA REM ENTERTAINMENT MONTEJO, RALPH DBA REM ENTERTAINMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-29-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-03-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER SIGNED.
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT FILED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, EUSTINOVE DBA REM ENTERTAINMENT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-06-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-24-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANTS, SMITH & PEYTON AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITH THE COURT.
PLTF CONTINUANCE REQUEST, FILED. $10 FEE PAID. TO BE SIGNED BY COMM.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-03-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-06-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, EUSTINOVE DBA REM ENTERTAINMENT PEYTON, MONICA DBA REM ENTERTAINMENT MONTEJO, RALPH DBA REM ENTERTAINMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDERED CONTINUANCE ON 1/6/ 03 AT 1:30PM; PAID $10 CASH; (CAL:20-1); TO FOLDER &TRAY FOR DECISION.
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT FILED; REQUIRES ORDER
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-24-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-29-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PARTIES REQUEST.
PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDERED CONTINUANCE ON 12/3 /02 AT 1:30PM(CAL:20-11); PD.$10 CHECK(REQUEST VIA MAIL);TO FOLDER FOR DECISION.
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO EUSTINOVE SMITH RETURNED--ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONTEJO, RALPH DBA REM ENTERTAINMENT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-24-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-24-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-24-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-02-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST SO AS TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN PROOFS OF SERVICE ON ALL DEFENDANTS, (EXCEPT RALPH MONTEJO DBA REM ENTERTAINMENT).
